overview: A modern appreciation gifting store where users can browse beautifully presented gift sets and bundles, view detailed product pages, manage a shopping cart, and complete secure purchases via Stripe checkout. Features a premium warm aesthetic with hero landing, product catalog, and order confirmation flow.
features: Hero landing page with warm branding and CTA
Product catalog with search and sorting
Product detail pages with gallery and add-to-cart
Shopping cart drawer with quantity management
Responsive premium design with warm color palette
Sample appreciation gift products and bundles
